CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Float32, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT * FROM test_table;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE value > 15;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table;
SELECT name AS username FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value > 15);
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM test_table;
SELECT id, value * 2 AS doubled_value FROM test_table;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY name;
SELECT name, SUM(value) AS total_value FROM test_table GROUP BY name ORDER BY total_value DESC;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE created_at BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-01-02';
SELECT id, COLUMNS('name') AS matched_columns FROM test_table;
SELECT *, min(value) AS min_value, max(value) AS max_value FROM test_table SETTINGS extremes = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 2;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table ORDER BY 1, 3 DESC;
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Bob');
SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE created_at < '2023-01-03') ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, name, value FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'A%';
SELECT id, value, name FROM (SELECT name, id, value FROM test_table WHERE value < 50) AS sub_query;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table t2 WHERE t2.id = test_table.id);
SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value < 10);
SELECT id, value AS v FROM test_table UNION ALL SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value > 20;
